pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property to target JDK 21.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/baba/organis.why_exists: The Locale(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and while it may still compile, using the new API is required to avoid deprecation warnings and prepare for future removal; however, strictly speaking, this is often treated as polishment unless strict deprecation-as-error is enabled. Given the prompt's rule to default to polishment when in doubt and that it likely still compiles, I will classify as polishment. Wait, the prompt says 'breaking ONLY if the migration won't compile or run'. Deprecated APIs usually still compile. So this is polishment.
